messages.content: 翻译为英文：除非你同意，否则我不会做
i will not do it unless you agree
翻译为英文：我不仅会说中文，还会说英文
i can speak not only chinese but also english
translate to chinese: even if it rains i will still go
即使下雨，我也要去
translate to chinese: if i have time i will help you
如果我有时间，我会帮你
翻译为英文：只要坚持，就能成功
as long as you persist you can succeed
翻译为英文：与其等别人帮忙，不如自己动手
rather than waiting for help you should do it yourself
translate to chinese: if you study hard you will succeed
如果你努力学习，就会成功
翻译为英文：一旦开始，就不要放弃
once you start do not give up
translate to chinese: as long as you persist you can succeed
只要坚持，就能成功
翻译为英文：如果他来了，请告诉我
if he comes please tell me
翻译为英文：如果我有时间，我会帮你
if i have time i will help you
translate to chinese: he was eating while watching tv
他一边吃饭一边看电视
translate to chinese: although he is tired he is still working
虽然很累，但是他还在工作
translate to chinese: since you have decided just do it
既然你决定了，就去做吧
translate to chinese: rather than waiting for help you should do it yourself
与其等别人帮忙，不如自己动手
翻译为英文：不管你信不信，这是事实
whether you believe it or not this is a fact
translate to chinese: because of the rain the game was cancelled
因为下雨，所以比赛取消了
translate to chinese: i can speak not only chinese but also english
我不仅会说中文，还会说英文
翻译为英文：与其浪费时间，不如做点有用的事
instead of wasting time you should do something useful
翻译为英文：他一边吃饭一边看电视
he was eating while watching tv
翻译为英文：即使下雨，我也要去
even if it rains i will still go
翻译为英文：如果明天下雨，我们就不去
if it rains tomorrow we will not go
translate to chinese: i will not do it unless you agree
除非你同意，否则我不会做
translate to chinese: instead of wasting time you should do something useful
与其浪费时间，不如做点有用的事
translate to chinese: if he comes please tell me
如果他来了，请告诉我
翻译为英文：只有努力才能成功
only by working hard can you succeed
翻译为英文：虽然很累，但是他还在工作
although he is tired he is still working
翻译为英文：无论发生什么，我都支持你
no matter what happens i support you
翻译为英文：如果你努力学习，就会成功
if you study hard you will succeed
翻译为英文：我既喜欢音乐也喜欢画画
i like both music and painting
翻译为英文：虽然很难，但是值得
although it is difficult it is worth it
translate to chinese: although it is difficult it is worth it
虽然很难，但是值得
translate to chinese: if it rains tomorrow we will not go
如果明天下雨，我们就不去
translate to chinese: whether you believe it or not this is a fact
不管你信不信，这是事实
翻译为英文：既然你决定了，就去做吧
since you have decided just do it
翻译为英文：因为下雨，所以比赛取消了
because of the rain the game was cancelled
translate to chinese: no matter what happens i support you
无论发生什么，我都支持你
translate to chinese: once you start do not give up
一旦开始，就不要放弃
translate to chinese: only by working hard can you succeed
只有努力才能成功
translate to chinese: i like both music and painting
我既喜欢音乐也喜欢画画
